criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance the shopping experience, such as personalized recommendations, visual search, or chatbots.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and official announcements.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, and usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app, including search capabilities, payment options, and customer support.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, and official documentation.

criteria.name: Market Presence
criteria.description: The app's popularity and user base size, indicating its reach and reliability.
criteria.sources: Download statistics, user reviews, and market analysis reports.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The app's introduction of new and unique features that set it apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: App feature updates, industry news, and expert reviews.
